## 🔖 Type of change

- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] refactor — no behavior change
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] test — tests only
- [ ] chore / ci — tooling, build, pipeline
- [ ] perf — performance

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes (or N/A)
- [ ] No secrets / `.env` committed
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed (`docs/`, `README.md`)
- [ ] Plan/phase status updated if applicable
